falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if β3 (FDI openness × competition policy) is positive and significant at p<0.10, AND β1 (FDI openness alone) is insignificant. PARTIAL if β3 is positive and significant but β1 is also positive and significant (FDI works regardless of competition). REFUTED if β3 is negative and significant, or if both β1 and β3 are insignificant. INFORMATIVE: BIT-instrumented 2SLS should produce the same sign as OLS; opposite sign suggests OLS endogeneity bias.
